초보자는 “그때 투자했다면?”을, 고급 사용자는 “앞으로 투자하면 은퇴: Beginners can see “what if I had invested then?”, while advanced users can simulate their future retirement if they invest from now on.
그때 투자했다면?: What if I had invested then?
앞으로 투자한다면?: What if I invest from now on?
Quickly check what an investment made at a past date would be worth today.
생년월, 은퇴 나이, 연금, 인출률을 반영해 미래 은퇴 현금흐름을 계산합: Calculate retirement cash flow using birth month, retirement age, pensions, and withdrawal rate.
v1.0.2 · iframe 리디렉션 문제를 피하기 위해 첫 화면은 선택: v1.2.0 · Multilingual version for Korean, Romanian, and English.
초보자용 · 쉬운 입력 · 만원 단위 · 혼합 투자 지원: Beginner · Easy input · KRW 10,000 units · Mixed investments
여러 자산을 함께 선택해 포트폴리오를 구성하고 자산별 예산을 개별 설정해: Select multiple assets, build a portfolio, and set each asset’s budget separately.
미래 목표 자산 시뮬레이션 및 4% 룰 연금 인출 설계: future target-asset simulation using CAGR plus 4% withdrawal planning
선택한 자산별 투자금액 설정: Set amount for each selected asset
KRW 선택 시 입력값은: For KRW, input values are in
Please select at least one asset above.
역사적 연평균 수익률(CAGR)을 기반으로, 오늘 이후 미래에도 계속 투: Simulates compound growth based on historical CAGR, assuming the investment continues into the future.
0년이면 오늘부터 납입 중단 후 거치만 계산: If 0, only holding without new contributions is calculated
전체 기간 = 납입기간 + 거치기간으로 자동 조정: Total period = contribution period + holding period
Calculates FIRE readiness using the 4% rule.
If dividends are used for spending, dividend ETF growth is adjusted conservatively.
Saves current settings in browser localStorage.
자산을 선택하고 투자금을 입력한 후 분석 버튼을 누르면, 세밀한 과거 자: Select assets, enter amounts, and run the analysis to see historical performance and future growth charts.
첫해 월 예상 인출액: Estimated monthly withdrawal in first year
Enter target monthly spending to see retirement readiness.
최종 예측 자산으로 교환 가능한 실물: What your estimated assets could buy
현대 그랜저 하이브리드 지분 (풀옵션 기준): Share of a Hyundai Grandeur Hybrid
일시금·적립식·거치·연금까지: Lump sum, DCA, holding, and pensions
자산마다 일시금 시기와 적립 시작/종료만 입력하면, 과거 평균 CAGR과: Enter only the lump-sum date and DCA start/end for each asset; historical CAGR and dividends are applied automatically from asset data.
Automatically calculates current age and retirement/pension start dates from birth month.
과거 평균 수익률 기반 시나리오: Scenarios based on historical average return
은퇴 후 기대수익률은 직접 입력하지 않고, 선택 자산의 과거 평균 CAG: Expected retirement return is not entered manually; the weighted average historical CAGR of selected assets is applied automatically.
연금 포함 첫해 월 생활비: First-year monthly cash flow including pension
기준(평균) 시나리오 기준으로 ETF 인출액, 연금, 총 월 현금흐름을: Shows ETF withdrawals, pensions, and total monthly cash flow through 2083 under the base scenario. Buttons update the withdrawal rate instantly.
거치/은퇴 시작부터 2083년까지, 선택한 인출률에 따라 매년 생활비를: Compares remaining assets from retirement start to 2083 after annual withdrawals using the selected rate across conservative/base/optimistic scenarios.
본 시뮬레이터는 교육용 도구이며 실제 투자수익, 세금, 환율, 수수료를: This simulator is an educational tool and does not guarantee actual returns, taxes, exchange rates, or fees. Results may vary significantly depending on inputs and assumptions.
